generated_oml:
namespace rdfs = "http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/DTDFVocab#"
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    rdfs:comment "Measures swinging motion of the hoist",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    rdfs:comment "Measures wind speed for environmental monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]
instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    rdfs:comment "Swing angle measurements from physical crane",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBContainer, MosquittoBroker
]
instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    rdfs:comment "Wind speed measurements from environmental monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBContainer, MosquittoBroker
]
instance TimescaleDBContainer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    rdfs:comment "Docker containerized TimescaleDB database for time-series data management",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]
instance MosquittoBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    rdfs:comment "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for data transmission",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]
instance GantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    rdfs:comment "Python-based gantrylib module for C4 Container integration",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, SimulationService
]
instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    rdfs:comment "Grafana dashboard for operational monitoring visualization",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]
instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    rdfs:comment "CAD model of the gantry crane structure",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibModule
]
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    rdfs:comment "Kinematic model of the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibModule
]
instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Transmits sensor data via MQTT protocol",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]
instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Logs historical crane state data for system state tracking",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]
instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Data visualization for operational monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]
instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Optimal control for trajectory planning",
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryPlanningAction
]
instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Simulation capabilities for trajectory planning",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]
instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Continuous validation to ensure synchronization between physical and virtual components",
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]
instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    rdfs:comment "Real-time data transmission from physical to virtual"
]
instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    rdfs:comment "Historical data storage for system state tracking"
]
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    rdfs:comment "Operational monitoring visualization via Grafana"
]
instance TrajectoryPlanningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    rdfs:comment "Optimal control for trajectory planning",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    rdfs:comment "Simulation of gantry crane motion for research and education"
]
instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    rdfs:comment "Continuous validation of physical-virtual synchronization"
]
instance MechanicalCraneStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    rdfs:comment "Mechanical structure of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]
instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    rdfs:comment "Arduino hardware controller for gantry crane operations"
]
instance LeftGantryMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    rdfs:comment "Motor controlling movement along X-axis of gantry"
]
instance RightGantryMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    rdfs:comment "Motor controlling movement along Y-axis of gantry"
]
instance HoistElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    rdfs:comment "Electromagnet mounted on hoist for lifting container-like pucks"
]
instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    rdfs:comment "Python program collecting data from physical crane and publishing to MQTT broker"
]
instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    rdfs:comment "Application subscribing to MQTT topics to log crane state data into TimescaleDB"
]
instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    rdfs:contains MechanicalCraneStructure, ArduinoController, LeftGantryMotor, RightGantryMotor, HoistElectromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, PhysicalCraneInterface, LoggingApplication
]
instance GantryCraneSystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment GantryCraneSystem
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Trajectory Generator Service utilizes a kinematic model to generate optimal movement trajectories, which are communicated to the Control Application via MQTT. The Control Application then uses the Physical Crane Interface to execute these commands on the physical crane. Command formats, validation mechanisms, conflict resolution, and execution confirmation details are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture of the lab scale gantry crane system is described using the C4 Model [5] with context and container diagrams to visualize software architecture components and their interactions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares real-time sensor measurements with simulated trajectories and checks deviations against predefined thresholds to ensure model validity and system safety."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Digital Twin services communicate using MQTT protocol through an MQTT broker for signaling. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system is deployed on a personal computer (on-premise), with the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard components containerized using Docker. Computational and storage requirements, scalability mechanisms, and detailed availability/reliability assurances are not provided in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "AutomationML is used for the digital twin model in the Air Quality Management exemplar. The C4 Model is applied for architecture visualization in the lab scale gantry crane system. No other industry standards or compliance frameworks are specified in the documents."
]
